modeNote: sophia_full / gate_only are SYSTEM-PROMPT-level here, NOT the full gated Sophia pipeline
finding: The Sophia system-prompt's anti-fabrication advantage is MODEL-DEPENDENT. WEAK model (llama-3.1-8b): raw fabricates 3/12 abstain cases (0.25) -> sophia-full 0/12 (0.00) — the effect reproduces. STRONG model (deepseek-v3): raw already 0/12 (0.00); sophia-full 1/12 (0.083) — no benefit, slight regression in this single run. Corroborates the ledger's weak-backend calibration win AND bounds it: the advantage decays toward zero as the base model strengthens.
implication: Provenance/abstention prompting is a crutch for weak models; on strong models (the actual path toward AGI) its marginal value on this axis is ~0. Real AGI value must come from capability gains (e.g. verifier-gated learning), not abstention scaffolding alone.
caveats: N=18, single run per model (no CI)
does NOT change canClaimAGI (False); does NOT clear any gate
